text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation moving through this space. The sleek lines and clear glass of the meeting room embody order and possibility, while the vibrant, colorful wall adorned with 'R+D' reminds me that innovation and uncertainty go hand in hand. I am surrounded by the atmosphere of potential—research and development demand openness, engagement, and sometimes discomfort. Here, I feel the friction between contemplation and action, theory and practice, all converging in this modern realm.
